aboutTeaser.heading: About Us
aboutTeaser.text: Welcome to Krupinec Bouw, your premier destination for superior construction repairs. We are a passionate and dedicated team specializing in the art of restoration, enhancement, and complete transformation of spaces!

bathroom.title: Bathroom Renovation
bullets: - Removal of old plumbing fixtures and tiles.
- Tile laying for floors and walls.
- Electrical work including installation of light fixtures and outlets.
- Installation of heating and ventilation systems.

general.title: General Renovation
bullets: - Complete interior updates: living rooms, kitchens, hallways.
- Flooring renovations including parquet, laminate, tile, and PVC installation.

dormer.title: Dormer Constructions
bullets: - Inspection and repair of rafters and battens.
- Replacement or restoration of roofing materials.
